arts.ttl: Spurs set to win Danso race - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Tottenham set to get the better of Wolves for Kevin Danso, Newcastle's Lloyd Kelly set for Italian switch, Tyrell Malacia's Benfica move in doubt, plus more.

arts.ttl: Spurs hijack Danso deal as defender snubs Wolves
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have hijacked a move to sign Lens defender Kevin Danso, despite Wolves seemingly being on the verge of signing the player.

arts.ttl: Tottenham complete stunning transfer hijack over Premier League rivals as problem finally solved
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have reportedly completed a stunning transfer swoop for Lens defender Kevin Danso - pinching the player from under the nose of Premier League rivals Wolverhampton Wanderers. According to Fabrizio Romano, Danso has now'said yes' to Tottenham and his medical at Wolves is set to be cancelled.

arts.ttl: Kevin Danso to undergo Tottenham medical ahead of 5-year deal
arts.sum: According to a report from RMC Sport, Kevin Danso (26) is set to undergo a medical with Tottenham Hotspur ahead of signing a deal which will tie him to the…

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'strike agreement' for £4.6m defender as Premier League rivals 'hijacked' at last minute
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur allegedly hijack Wolverhampton Wanderers' move for Lens defender Kevin Danso after being rejected by AC Milan's Fikayo Tomori.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham now set to sign £21m player at last minute with Premier League club furious
Tottenham hijack centre-back transfer – Sources say he’s joining soon
arts.sum: Latest reports on Tottenham Hotspur’s winter dealings suggest that centre-back Kevin Danso is edging closer to a move to Hotspur Way after a dramatic hijack.... The post Tottenham hijack centre-back transfer – Sources say he’s joining soon appeared first on Spurs Web.

arts.ttl: Tottenham reach agreement with Lens for Wolves’ target Kevin Danso
arts.sum: According to an update from Fabrice Hawkins, Tottenham Hotspur have secured an agreement with RC Lens for Kevin Danso (26). Tottenham are taking a chance this winter to try and…

arts.ttl: 'They're definitely losing': Paul Merson has just predicted the result of Brentford vs Tottenham clash
Liverpool suffer blow ahead of Carabao Cup second-leg against Spurs - with Reds star a major doubt for tie after suffering an injury in Bournemouth win
arts.sum: It came after Liverpool left Chiesa and Gomez out of their matchday squad despite the pair being fit, underlining the fact the Premier League leaders had a clean bill of health.
